description: Maintained top-tier academic standing throughout my collegiate journey, reflecting a continuous commitment to excellence.
Assisted in batch management, event planning, and student representation for the IT department.
Led the batch in academic and extracurricular coordination, ensuring efficient communication and organizational success.
Handled documentation, meeting minutes, and administrative support for batch activities.
Managed community outreach, social media presence, and technical event communications for the premier IT organization.
Recognized specifically for outstanding performance, logic building, and clean code architecture in integrative systems.
Graduated as the highest-ranking student within the ICT department and ranked 6th overall across all departments.
Awarded for exceptional research, documentation, and technical writing for the final senior high school capstone.
